title: Chickens Overhaul
description: Overhauls chickens by adding new models and variants!
body:
Chickens Overhaul changes the boring chickens from Minecraft.\
It adds more variants to them, and changes their models to look more realistic.\
![A chicken](https://i.postimg.cc/qR2pvLhr/chicken-model.png)\
The chickens have slightly different running animations, too.\
And, of course, we can't forget adorable babies!\
![A baby chicken](https://i.postimg.cc/Kz7y28wv/chicken-baby-model.png)\
The pack requires either [Optifine](https://optifine.net/home) or [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) + [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features).\
Enjoy!
